records.ety: [L. impotenia inability, poverty, lack of moderation. See Impotent.]

defs: The quality or condition of being impotent; lack of strength or power, animal, intellectual, or moral; weakness; feebleness; inability; imbecility.
quotes: Some were poor by impotency of nature; as young fatherless children, old decrepit persons, idiots, and cripples.
O, impotence of mind in body strong!

defs: Lack of procreative power; inability to copulate, or beget children; also, sometimes, sterility; barrenness;
the inability to achieve or sustain a penile erection; erectile dysfunction.
